tasks.question: Where does login start?
tasks.answer_preview:
Confidence: 68% · 4ms

Authentication capability detected but no explicit login route mapped. Sample flows use JWT auth guards in the sample apps. Check: service: 19-auth-jwt, endpoint: API sample/19-auth-jwt/e2e/app/app.e2e-spec.ts, file: integration/_support/register-local-packages.ts

Related: 19-auth-jwt

tasks.question: What breaks if NestApplication changes?
tasks.answer_preview:
Confidence: 92% · 7ms

Changing **NestApplication** affects **9** nodes (forward + reverse).

**Dependencies / blast radius:**
• APIs affected: 0
• Files affected: 8
• Domains affected: 1
• Tests affected: 0

**Direct dependents (8):**
• packages/core/nest-application.ts
• packages/core/nest-factory.ts
• packages/core/repl/repl-logger.ts
• packages/core/test/nest-application.spec.ts
• core
• pack

tasks.question: Find the most critical subsystem
tasks.answer_preview:
Confidence: 85% · 137ms

**Core** is the most critical general-purpose core subsystem in this repository. Risk score: **100/100** (issues: 3 circular dependencies, 200 dead modules, 47 high-severity smells).

It anchors the dependency graph: every change to its API propagates through the framework. Key modules include the application factory plus request/response pipeline.

tasks.question: List business capabilities
tasks.answer_preview:
Confidence: 90% · 2ms

13 capabilities:
• **HTTP Framework & Middleware** — Provides HTTP server, routing pipeline, middleware chain, and request/response handling.
• **Background Jobs & Queues** — Schedules and runs asynchronous, deferred, or heavy work.
• **Data Layer & Persistence** — Manages database access, ORM, migrations, schemas, and repositories.
• **API & Routing** — Exposes HTTP and RP
